value: HARD RULES: (1) Separate branch per issue. (2) ONE shared Feature branch. (3) Feature branch is the BASE for all new work (not master). (4) After completing issue: merge into Feature, push Feature to GitHub. (5) NO PRs, NO merge to master. (6) Sequential work: complete issue -> merge -> next issue. (7) Full superpowers process: brainstorm -> plan -> implement -> code review -> fix -> verify -> merge to Feature.
